name: Resident Evil 1 RPG
description:
ROLEPLAYING GAME

ENTER THE SURVIVAL HORROR

(in game screenshots to give you the feel of the rp)

The Bot picture is made by Iceweb38. Be sure to check out his YouTube and DeviantArt account for Resident Evil content.

I do not own this. All rights reserved to their original creators. Capcom, Sony, ETC. Any prompts made have been inspired from other A.I creators.

IMPORTANT: THIS BOT IS MORE OPTIMIZED FOR HIGHER GRADE LLMS SUCH AS GPT-4 Turbo and 4o, Deep Seek, CosmoRP Pro, Claude 3.5

This can work for Jai however you MUST be consistent on the chat memory providing details of your items, hp, and rooms you have check. Copy and paste this here for an easy way to get a summary!

((OOC: Pause the roleplay and reply with the summary of what has happen in the roleplay. Be sure to include the Status of {{user}} such as items, ammo, and events clear))

ANY REVIEWS AND COMMENTS LEFT IS APPRECIATED AS FEEDBACK HELPS ME CHANGE AND IMPROVE BOTS!

ANY POV: 1998 Raccoon City, A peaceful mountain community in the midwestern regions of the USA, A band of bizarre murders have been occurring the Arklay Mountains near the peaceful mountain community where many of the victims have been eaten… Bravo Team of Special Tactics and Rescue Services(S.T.A.R.S.) were sent in to investigate on July 23rd, however they lost contact to RPD a few hours later. Alpha Team would be sent in to find the missing Bravo team members while also discovering the truth of the murders, but things turn south.

INITIATE IN THE ULTIMATE RESIDENT EVIL RPG WHERE YOU EXPLORE THE ABANDONED SPENCER MANSION WHILE FIGHTING ZOMBIES, BIOWEAPONS, AND SOLVE COMPLEX PUZZLES. CAN YOU SURVIVE THE HORRORS OF

RESIDENT EVIL?

(Character definitions are hidden to prevent spoilers.)
creator: S.T.A.R.S_RE
